nasb.text: men fainting from fear and the expectation of the things which are coming upon the world; for the powers of the heavens will be shaken.

esv.text: people fainting with fear and with foreboding of what is coming on the world. For the powers of the heavens will be shaken.

cnv.text: 天上的萬象震動，人因為等待即將臨到世界的事，都嚇昏了。

ccb.text: 天体必震动，人类想到世界要面临的事都吓得魂不附体。

csbs.text: 人们预料到将要临到世界的事，就吓得魂不附体；因为诸天的各势力都将被震动。
